name: CV / Resume
description: Turn a folder of candidates into a queryable talent database.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- full_name (string)
- email (string)
- phone_number (string)
- location (string: city + country)
- linkedin_url (string)
- current_role (string)
- years_of_experience (number)
- work_experience (array): each item has company, role, start_date, end_date, description
- education (array): each item has institution, degree, field_of_study, graduation_year
- skills (array of strings)
- languages (array): each item has language, level

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
